calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-09-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-09-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Kurtiss A. Jacobs, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Discover Bank, Issuer of the Discover Card.
No appearance by defendant Humberto E. Lugo.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on August 12, 2009.
Declaration of Robert Adkins in Lieu of Personal Testimony (CCP Section 98) was filed today, November 9, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, November 9, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Discover Bank, Issuer of the Discover Card, and against defendant Humberto E. Lugo as follows:

Principal - $3,065.42.
Interest - $315.84.
Attorney's Fees - $630.00.
Costs - $245.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $4,256.26.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-12-2009 Set For Trial On Nov-09-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Defendant's Counsel for failure to file Proof of Service of Order Granting Motion to Withdraw is ordered off calendar and dissolved/Proof of Service on file. Court ordered a Court Trial scheduled on 11/9/2009 at 9:00 AM, in Department 206. Court to give notice of the Trial Date. Proceedings not reported. (212)
